title: More Variants Core
description: Base mod for More Variants Add-ons
body:
[![purple badge that reads "a Creation by LieOn Studios"](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios)                                              Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Variants-Core) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ## More Variants Core _**More Variants Core**_ provides the shared integrations and systems used by the _More Variants_ Add-ons. By itself, this mod will not add any content and is only needed when using a mod with the **"More Variants:"**-prefix, such as [**More Variants:** Pale Oak Backport](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/more-variants-pale-oak-backport). > ##### For developers: >
> Can I use More Variants Core to develop my own Add-on? > You are a modder yourself and are wondering if this could be useful for you?

> Wow, sweet, and generally yes, that would be possible.
> I wrote everything to be very modular and needing as little code as possible on the Add-on side, though generally with only myself in mind.
> I do - as of now - not foresee other modders being interested in creating their own Add-ons for More X Variant mods, as such there is currently no documentation on how to do such thing. However, I wouldn't mind creating some if there's interest.
> So, please, if you're considering it, let me know! (: >
---
